end,{},function()m=m+(-155942-(-155943))h[m]=529003+-529002 return m end,function(q)local e,c=279922-279921,q[-749622-(-749623)]while c do h[c],e=h[c]-(-710341-(-710342)),e+(631862-631861)if 367502-367502==h[c]then h[c],z[c]=nil,nil end c=q[e]end end,function(q)h[q]=h[q]-(-740267+740268)if 318320+-318320==h[q]then h[q],z[q]=nil,nil end end,function(q,e)local K=M(e)local b=function(b,P,I,N,U,z)return c(q,{b,P,I,N,U,z},e,K)end return b end,function(q,e)local K=M(e)local b=function(b,P,I,N,U)return c(q,{b;P;I;N,U},e,K)end return b end,function(q,e)local K=M(e)local
